title: Nether Translate
description: NetherTranslate is a lightweight Minecraft mod that automatically converts your Nether coordinates into their Overworld equivalents in real time.
body: Nether Translate is a lightweight Minecraft mod that automatically converts your Nether coordinates into their Overworld equivalents in real time. Perfect for anarchy servers, it makes portal linking and long-distance travel fast, precise, and frustration-free.
